title: Don't Start ANY Claude Code Project Until You Watch This
summary: Austin Marchese presents three rules for successfully building projects with Claude Code, inspired by Y Combinator's CEO. The video covers what to build versus what not to build, and outlines six moves for leading an AI team, drawn from his experience scaling startups.
